SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ELVIS CORRALES & DEFENDANT LABITORIA. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY ASSISTED MR. CORRALES AT TODAY'S HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT DEFENDANT TERESA LABITORIA WAIVED SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY CORRALES, ELVIS AS TO DEFENDANT LABITORIA, TERESA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
